setup.title: Welcome to HELBOOT
setup.intro: Let's set up your provisioning server in a few steps.
setup.networkQuestion: Does your network already have a DHCP server (e.g. your router)?
setup.networkProxyHint: Recommended. No changes to your existing network.
setup.networkDhcpHint: For isolated lab networks without a DHCP server.

hosts.title: Hosts
hosts.empty: No hosts yet. Register a machine by its MAC address or wait for network discovery.

profiles.title: Installation profiles
profiles.empty: No profiles yet. A profile describes one automated installation.
profiles.name: Name
profiles.confirmDelete: Delete this profile and all its versions?

isos.title: ISO images
isos.empty: No ISO images yet. Upload an original ISO — HELBOOT detects the operating system automatically.
isos.uploading: Uploading… this can take a while for large images.
isos.confirmDelete: Delete this ISO record and its file?

installations.title: Installations
installations.empty: No installations yet. Queue one from the Hosts page.
installations.queued: Installation queued — the machine will install on its next network boot.

logs.title: Logs
logs.empty: No log entries at this level.

settings.title: Settings
settings.serverIpHint: Address PXE clients use to reach HELBOOT. Leave empty to auto-detect.
settings.saved: Saved. Restart HELBOOT to apply the network changes.
settings.backupImportStaged: Backup staged. Restart HELBOOT to apply the restore.
settings.backupHint: The backup contains the database: settings, users, hosts, profiles and history. ISO files are not included.

auth.session_expired: Your session has expired, please sign in again
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action
auth.csrf: Security token invalid, please reload the page
auth.rate_limited: Too many attempts — please wait a moment

setup.invalid_username: Username must have at least 3 characters
setup.weak_password: Password must have at least 10 characters

host.mac_exists: A host with this MAC address already exists

iso.invalid_filename: The filename must be simple and end in .iso or .img
iso.exists: An ISO with this filename already exists

installation.no_profile: The host has no profile assigned
installation.already_active: This host already has an active installation
installation.not_cancellable: Only waiting installations can be cancelled

network.invalid_range: DHCP mode requires a valid address range

backup.invalid_archive: This is not a valid HELBOOT backup archive
